chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4806 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.21021/2019 (Stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 12-05-2025 Mr. Naeem Suleman, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sarmad Ali, advocate for respondent No.2. Learned counsel for the petitioner states under instructions that the petition has served its purpose in view of statement of the respondent No.2 dated 21st October, 2019 accompanied by a certificate dated 11.10.2019 which reads as follows:- It is to certify that an amount of Rs.1,060,718/- had inadvertently debited into M/s Weave & Knit Pvt Ltd customer account. 5940190000. However, after notifying this error the debited amount has already been withdrawn from the customer’s account hence no amount is payable by M/s Weave & Knit in this regard. In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
